introSection: Bear Trax is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Seabreeze Amusement Park built by E&F Miler Industries in 1997 and designed in conjunction between E&F and George Long. The coaster completes two full circuits each ride.
fullText:
Bear Trax is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Seabreeze Amusement Park built by E&F Miler Industries in 1997 and designed in conjunction between E&F and George Long. The coaster completes two full circuits each ride.



Black track and white supports.
